meta.title: Krown Level Enterprises - Community Sustainability. Personal Sovereignty. Holistic Living.
meta.description: Charli Smith is the founder of Krown Level Enterprises, a Jacksonville-based community sustainability platform offering agriculture education, wellness education, financial literacy, and self-defense training.

hero.eyebrow: Grow your food. Heal your body. Defend your peace.
hero.lead: Led by instructor Charli Smith, Krown Level Enterprises helps people reclaim control over their food, health, resources, safety, and sustainability through holistic education, community programs, and practical skill building.

image.alt: Charli Smith - Founder of Krown Level Enterprises

brand-ecosystem.heading: What Is Krown Level Enterprises?
brand-ecosystem.lead: Krown Level Enterprises is a community sustainability platform designed to help people build the skills and habits needed to live healthier, safer, and more self-sufficient lives.

pillars.title: Agriculture Education
pillars.description: Hands-on gardening, food systems, plant stewardship, and community growing skills.

pillars.title: Wellness Education
pillars.description: Holistic habits for herbs, nutrition, movement, recovery, and whole-person alignment.

pillars.title: Financial Literacy
pillars.description: Practical education that supports independent decisions, preparedness, and long-term stability.

pillars.title: Self-Defense
pillars.description: Mindset-first personal safety, awareness, lawful response, and responsible protection skills.

brand-ecosystem.closing: Different paths. One mission: helping people reclaim alignment, resilience, and independence.

founder-bio.heading: Meet Charli Smith
paragraphs: Charli Smith is the founder of Krown Level Enterprises, a Jacksonville-based initiative focused on community sustainability through agriculture education, wellness education, financial literacy, and self-defense.
Her work blends generations of agricultural wisdom, military training, practical education, and holistic wellness practices to help people take control of their lives from the ground up.
Charli believes true sustainability requires four essential forms of sovereignty:
founder-bio.closing: She teaches through a blend of science, lived experience, and ancestral knowledge, helping people make meaningful changes that are practical, disciplined, and sustainable.

images.alt: Charli Smith with Krown Level banner

vision.heading: The Vision
paragraphs: Krown Level Enterprises exists to help communities reclaim the skills that create resilience.

By teaching agriculture education, wellness education, financial literacy, and self-defense together, Charli Smith is building more than programs. She is building pathways for people to become healthier, more capable, and more connected to the resources around them.
This work is about more than information. It is about restoration, discipline, and long-term empowerment.
vision.quote: Sustainability starts when people can feed themselves, care for themselves, manage their resources, and protect their peace.

credentials.heading: Charli's Background
credentials.lead: Charli's approach is rooted in real training, lived discipline, and years of hands-on study.

items.title: Military & Self-Defense
items: 15 years, United States Air Force - Security Forces

items.title: Holistic Wellness
items: Wellness consulting through Genie's Healing Elements
Focus on herbs, exercise, behavioral habits, and natural alignment
Specialty support for chronic pain, terminal illness, anxiety, and insomnia

quote-banner.quote: "Grow your food. Heal your body. Defend your peace."

wellness.heading: Genie's Healing Elements
paragraphs: Genie's Healing Elements helps clients restore optimal wellness through personalized strategies built around herbs, nutrition, movement, and habit alignment.
This work is designed for people who want a more natural, intentional approach to healing and wellness support.
Charli helps clients assess where they are now, identify what may be throwing them out of alignment, and create a realistic wellness path forward.
audienceItems: Anyone wanting more intentional health habits

processItems.title: Assessment
processItems.content: We begin by understanding where you are in your health journey, what challenges you're facing, and what level of support you need.

processItems.title: Alignment
processItems.content: We identify habits, lifestyle patterns, stressors, and physical needs that may be affecting your wellness.

processItems.title: Natural Support
processItems.content: Herbs, movement, nutritional shifts, and behavioral strategies are considered based on your goals and condition.

processItems.title: Ongoing Practice
processItems.content: Healing is a process. The goal is to build sustainable wellness habits that support long-term change.

wellness.ctaLead: Ready to take a more intentional approach to your health? Start with a one-on-one consultation tailored to your goals and current wellness needs.

plant-klub.eyebrow: Learn to Grow Your Own Food
plant-klub.lead: Plant Klub is a community-centered gardening and education initiative designed to reconnect people with the land, their food, and the practical skill of cultivation.
plant-klub.intro: Members learn how to grow herbs, vegetables, and medicinal plants while building confidence, community, and self-sufficiency.
plant-klub.offeringsHeading: What You Can Learn in Plant Klub

offerings.title: Herbal Gardening
offerings.description: Learn how to grow herbs that support wellness and everyday use.

offerings.title: Food Growing Basics
offerings.description: Understand soil, watering, planting cycles, and what it takes to grow your own food.

offerings.title: Community Exchange
offerings.description: Trade plants, share knowledge, and build your skills alongside others.

offerings.title: Home Installations
offerings.description: Get support designing and installing a personalized herb or food garden at home.

supportParagraphs: Plant Klub also offers personalized home garden installations for people who want the benefits of growing herbs and food but need help getting started.
Each installation begins with an assessment that considers:
plant-klub.eventsLead: Join the next Plant Klub experience and learn in community.

sage-defense.heading: S.A.G.E. Defense Systems
sage-defense.subtitle: Sacred Alignment Grounding Everything
paragraphs: S.A.G.E. Defense Systems teaches people how to develop the mindset, awareness, and practical skill needed to protect themselves and others responsibly.

Charli's training begins with mindset first, because effective self-defense starts before physical action. From there, students build the ability to assess threats, respond appropriately, and protect themselves with confidence and discipline.
sage-defense.philosophy: Not every threat is what it seems. A big part of self-defense is learning the difference between bait and danger, and knowing how to respond lawfully, effectively, and under pressure.

trainingLevels.title: Defend Yourself
trainingLevels.description: Situational awareness, mindset, and personal protection basics.

trainingLevels.title: Defend Others
trainingLevels.description: Skills for protecting family members and vulnerable people.

trainingLevels.title: Coordinated Defense
trainingLevels.description: Learning how to move effectively when others are involved.

trainingLevels.title: Advanced Readiness
trainingLevels.description: For those seeking a deeper level of preparedness and survival training.

faqItems.question: Do I need prior experience?
faqItems.answer: No. Training can begin at a foundational level and grow with your comfort and skill.

faqItems.question: Is this only firearm training?
faqItems.answer: No. S.A.G.E. Defense Systems includes mindset, verbal awareness, self-defense principles, and weapon education where appropriate.

faqItems.question: Is mindset really that important?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Awareness, decision making, lawful response, and emotional control are all essential parts of defense.

faqItems.question: Can beginners join?
faqItems.answer: Yes. The training path is designed to meet people where they are.

outcomes.text: Confidence in growing your own food
A more intentional approach to wellness

testimonials.quote: Plant Klub opened my eyes to what growing your own food really means. It is more than gardening - it is about taking control of your health and your table.

testimonials.quote: Charli approaches wellness with such intention and care. She helped me understand my body in ways no one else had.

testimonials.quote: The self-defense training changed my mindset completely. I feel more aware, more confident, and more prepared.
